text:
Once upon a time, in a small village surrounded by orange fields, lived a curious cat named Mittens. Mittens loved exploration. One sunny day, she decided to investigate the forest nearby.

She prowled cautiously along old oak roots, her golden fur shimmering in the sunlight. Atop a bush, she spotted something unusual. A shiny disk!

Excited, Mittens climbed higher. Beneath her paw was a map! She snatched it.

"This must lead to treasure!" she thought.

With trembling paws, she followed the markings south. After a while, she wandered into a clearing. There stood a grand old clock. Its hands moved slowly.

Mittens sat beside it. A voice echoed softly.

"Who visits me?"

"Hmmm," Mittens replied thoughtfully. "Just curious..."

Days passed, then weeks. Then one day, she heard clinking sounds. Quieter ones.

Something shiny arrived. A mouse!

They became friends. She taught him how to
